task.title: Checking the Sheet Counter - Mac
task.shortdesc: You can check the number of sheets of paper that have fed through the product

context.p: You can check the number of sheets of paper that have fed through the product by checking the sheet counter.

step.cmd: In the Apple menu or the Dock, select System Preferences. Select Print & Fax, Print & Scan, or Printers & Scanners, select your product, and select Options & Supplies. Select Utilityand select Open Printer Utility.
After checking the number of sheets fed into the printer, click OKto close the window.
